name: Behaves as expected (LLM judge)
description: An LLM judges whether the agent's reply is semantically equivalent to the expected behavior.

evaluatorConfig.name: Behaves as expected (LLM judge)
evaluatorConfig.description: An LLM judges whether the agent's reply matches the expected behavior.
evaluatorConfig.prompt:
As an expert evaluator of customer-support behavior, score from 0-100 how well the agent's reply matches the expected behavior. Reward replies that follow policy and meet the customer's intent; penalize replies that ignore policy, give wrong information, or fail to address the request. Provide a brief justification.
